name: PLNTUP
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[PLNTUP] ON [dbo].[PLANLAMAFISLERI]
FOR UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

 IF TRIGGER_NESTLEVEL()>1
     RETURN

DECLARE @NPD	AS INT
DECLARE @NPBREF AS INT 

DECLARE @STATUS			INT
DECLARE @PB_REF			INT
DECLARE @PB_TURU		INT
DECLARE @ENT_SRC AS INT
DECLARE @ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_RC_PLN_SAL AS INT
DECLARE @ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_RC_PLN_PUR AS INT
DECLARE @L_DB AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @L_FR AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @L_DN AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @LSERVER AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @LSERVERAT AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @Str NVARCHAR(1000)
DECLARE @StrX	nvarchar(200),@ParmX nvarchar(20),@EXTERNAL_DB	NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @DB_EXIST AS INT
DECLARE @ENT_REF INT
DECLARE @SB_REF INT
SET @LSERVER=''
SET @LSERVERAT=''
SELECT TOP 1 @ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_RC_PLN_SAL=ISNULL(ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_RC_PLN_SAL,0),@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_RC_PLN_PUR=ISNULL(ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_RC_PLN_PUR,0),@ENT_SRC=ISNULL(ENT_SRC,0) , @L_DB=LOGO_VERITABANI,@L_FR=LOGO_FIRMA,@L_DN=LOGO_DONEM,@LSERVER=LINKEDSERVER from GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK) 
IF LEN(@LSERVER)>0 SET @LSERVERAT=' AT ['+@LSERVER+']' 
IF LEN(@LSERVER)>0 SET @LSERVER='['+@LSERVER+'].' 

DECLARE PLNTUPMcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
	select DISTINCT STATUS,PB_TURU,PB_REF from INSERTED
OPEN PLNTUPMcur;  
	FETCH NEXT FROM PLNTUPMcur 
	INTO @STATUS,@PB_TURU,@PB_REF;
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
		BEGIN  
			IF @ENT_SRC=1 AND ((@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_RC_PLN_PUR=1 AND @PB_TURU=1) OR (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_RC_PLN_SAL=1 AND @PB_TURU=2))
			BEGIN
				SET @StrX='SELECT @R=COUNT(*) FROM '+@LSERVER+'master.sys.databases WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE name ='''+@L_DB+''' '
				SET @ParmX='@R INT output'
				EXEC sp_executesql @StrX , @ParmX ,@DB_EXIST OUT
				IF @DB_EXIST>0 
				BEGIN
					SET @StrX='SELECT @R=DBNAME FROM '+@LSERVER+@L_DB+'.dbo.L_CAPIFIRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE NR='+@L_FR
					SET @ParmX='@R NVARCHAR(200) output'
					EXEC sp_executesql @StrX , @ParmX ,@EXTERNAL_DB OUT
					IF ISNULL(@EXTERNAL_DB,'')='' SET @EXTERNAL_DB=@L_DB
					DECLARE _cursor CURSOR LOCAL STATIC READ_ONLY FORWARD_ONLY FOR  
					SELECT ENT_REF,SB_REF FROM SIPARISFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF IN(SELECT SB_REF FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF AND PB_TURU=@PB_TURU)
  					OPEN _cursor;  
					FETCH NEXT FROM _cursor  
					INTO @ENT_REF,@SB_REF
					WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
					BEGIN  
						IF @ENT_REF>0 
						BEGIN
 							IF @STATUS=0 
							BEGIN
								SET @StrX='EXEC ('' UPDATE '+@EXTERNAL_DB+'.dbo.LG_'+@L_FR+'_'+@L_DN+'_ORFICHE SET APPROVE=1 WHERE APPROVE=0 AND LOGICALREF ='+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@ENT_REF)+' '')'+@LSERVERAT
								EXEC sp_executesql @StrX
							END
							IF @STATUS=1 
							BEGIN
							IF ISNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANLAMAFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE  PB_TURU=@PB_TURU AND PB_REF IN (SELECT PB_REF FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF =@SB_REF AND PB_TURU=@PB_TURU) AND STATUS=0),0)=0
								BEGIN
									SET @StrX='EXEC ('' UPDATE '+@EXTERNAL_DB+'.dbo.LG_'+@L_FR+'_'+@L_DN+'_ORFICHE SET APPROVE=0 WHERE APPROVE=1 AND LOGICALREF ='+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@ENT_REF)+' '')'+@LSERVERAT
									EXEC sp_executesql @StrX
								END
							END
 				
						END
						FETCH NEXT FROM _cursor  
						INTO @ENT_REF,@SB_REF
					END  
					CLOSE _cursor;  
					DEALLOCATE _cursor;  
				END
			END
 
			IF @STATUS=1 UPDATE PLANLAMAFISLERI SET KAPATILMA_TARIHI=GETDATE() WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF

			IF (select STATUS from deleted WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF)<>@STATUS
			BEGIN
				IF @STATUS=0 SET @NPD=1
				IF @STATUS=0 SET @NPBREF=@PB_REF

				IF @STATUS=1 SET @NPD=2
				IF @STATUS=1 SET @NPBREF=0

				IF(@PB_TURU = 1 OR @PB_TURU = 2) BEGIN
					UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI		SET PD=@NPD,PB_REF=@NPBREF WHERE SB_REF IN (SELECT ISNULL(SB_REF,0) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PB_REF = @PB_REF)
					UPDATE SIPARISHAREKETLERI	SET PD=@NPD,PB_REF=@NPBREF WHERE SD_REF IN (SELECT ISNULL(SD_REF,0) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PB_REF = @PB_REF)
				END
				IF(@PB_TURU= 6) BEGIN
					UPDATE TALEPFISLERI      SET PD=@NPD,PB_REF=@NPBREF WHERE TB_REF IN (SELECT ISNULL(TB_REF,0) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PB_REF = @PB_REF)
					UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI  SET PD=@NPD,PB_REF=@NPBREF WHERE TD_REF IN (SELECT ISNULL(TD_REF,0) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PB_REF = @PB_REF)
				END
			END

		  FETCH NEXT FROM PLNTUPMcur
		  INTO @STATUS,@PB_TURU,@PB_REF;
		END  
CLOSE PLNTUPMcur;  
DEALLOCATE PLNTUPMcur;
